title: Head Baseball Coach (with possible teaching assignment)
description: This Head Baseball coaching assignment is for the 2026-27 school year with possibility of a full time teaching assignment.WCSD coaches are required to meet all UHSAA certification requirementspriorto starting assignment and are required to maintain certifications during duration of employment.  An active Utah Secondary Education License is required for the teaching assignment.If any additional questions, applicants can contact the Athletic Director, Marcus Matua, at marcus.matua@washk12.org.A st...
